points.text: Declared global health emergency by WHO [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
COVID-19 is an illness caused by SARS-CoV-2 [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
It spreads between people in close contact [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
Most people have mild illness or no symptoms [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
Older adults and people with medical conditions are at higher risk [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
COVID-19 can lead to hospital care or death [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
COVID-19 is an infectious respiratory illness caused by SARS-CoV-2 [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
‘CO’ stands for corona, ‘VI’ for virus, and ‘D’ for disease [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
